mapper.sql: id, name, model_type, provider, model_name, api_key, base_url, temperature, max_tokens, is_default, is_active, sort_order, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_llm_model (name, model_type, provider, model_name, api_key, base_url, temperature, max_tokens, is_default, is_active, sort_order) VALUES (#{name}, #{modelType}, #{provider}, #{modelName}, #{apiKey}, #{baseUrl}, COALESCE(#{temperature}, 0.3), #{maxTokens}, COALESCE(#{isDefault}, FALSE), COALESCE(#{isActive}, TRUE), COALESCE(#{sortOrder}, 0))
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_llm_model WHERE model_type = #{modelType} AND is_default = TRUE AND is_active = TRUE ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM sys_llm_model WHERE model_type = #{modelType} AND is_active = TRUE ORDER BY is_default DESC, sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM sys_llm_model ORDER BY model_type ASC, is_default DESC, sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_llm_model SET is_default = FALSE WHERE model_type = #{modelType}
